Meaning.En: The amount of three-dimensional space occupied by a substance or enclosed within a container.
Meaning.Example: The volume of the cube is calculated by multiplying the length, width, and height.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả lượng không gian mà một vật chiếm dụng.
Situation.En: Describing the amount of space an object or substance occupies.

Meaning.En: A book that is part of a series or collection.
Meaning.Example: The library has all 12 volumes of the encyclopedia.

Situation.Vi: Dùng để chỉ một cuốn sách trong bộ sách nhiều tập.
Situation.En: Used to refer to one book in a multi-volume set.

Meaning.En: The degree of loudness or the intensity of a sound.
Meaning.Example: She turned up the volume on the radio to hear the news clearly.

Situation.Vi: Mức độ to nhỏ của âm thanh phát ra từ thiết bị âm thanh.
Situation.En: The loudness level of sound output from an audio device.

Meaning.En: To increase the loudness of a sound, especially from a speaker or device.
Meaning.Example: He quickly volume-d the music when the phone rang.

Situation.Vi: Hành động tăng độ to của âm thanh đang phát.
Situation.En: The action of making a sound louder, typically by adjusting a control.
